'''Caamor''' was the third planet in the [[Cirius system/Legends|Cirius system]]. It was a [[Water/Legends|frozen]] ball of rock, and was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Planet-stub}}
